who: accounting firms processing 5–15 asset depreciation schedules/month
offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 asset depreciation schedules/month, manual calculations cause compliance issues. We generate accurate schedules instead of manual calculations using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate or delayed depreciation schedules can lead to compliance issues and client dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual entry of asset data and generate schedules
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common asset inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
